APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for moving parties Brayton Purcell LLP and Nancy Williams

RULING:
BRAYTON PURCELL LLP'S AND NANCY WILLIAMS' MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Brayton Purcell LLP,'s and Nancy Williams' motion to be relieved as counsel for plaintiffs Milton Jackson and Marva Jackson is granted. Brayton Purcell demonstrated they properly served plaintiffs. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Angela Sinclair of AIKEN WELCH, CSR # 13902 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)
